question: How many customers do not have a listed payment method?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Payment_Methods);

back_translation.intent: 统计未在Customer_Payment_Methods表中记录支付方式的客户数量
filters: customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Payment_Methods)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译准确表达了原始问题中统计没有支付方式记录的客户数量的意图，使用了正确的过滤条件和聚合函数。
